name: 8pk 14 fl oz Stacking Tumblers - Room Essentials™
description:
Kickstart your morning with family or host friends for an evening drink with the 8-Pack of Stacking Tumblers from Room Essentials™. This pack of eight tumblers features a clear construction to showcase the drinks served in them. Made of glass, the tumblers are suitable for cold beverages only and can be tossed in the dishwasher for easy cleanup after use. Best of all, they have a stackable design to help you save storage space when they're not in use.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
